content: Hi, my name is Darius and I'm currently an undergraduate at UIC pursing a BS in computer science. Along with this, I also work as a research assistant on-campus. I currently am assisting Komal Shinde under Professor Brent Stephens. Specifically, I am currently researching Barefoot Tofino programmable switch configurations in P4 regarding ECN congestion and logical queues.
